title: Opening for Production Engineer at Alstom India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Alstom India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!
